dict.string: Poker HUD uses Accessibility to read PokerStars table-window titles so it can position the HUD overlay above the correct table. It does not read, modify, or capture anything else from other applications.
Copyright © 2026 Poker HUD. All rights reserved.
Poker HUD optionally uses Screen Recording as a fallback to detect PokerStars table-window positions when Accessibility permission is not granted. No screen content is ever recorded or transmitted.
